title: Restructure the Northwind note answer-first
guidance: Reward an answer-first structure with clean, well-nested bullets. Penalise keeping the build-up or burying the recommendation.

runner_input.instruction: Restructure the note below so the recommendation leads, then the supporting arguments with their evidence.
runner_input.constraints: Output: markdown — a bold recommendation on the first line, then nested bullets (top-level claims, with evidence indented beneath each).

source_blocks.text: Top-5 merchants are 41% of volume, two on rolling annual contracts. An interchange review is pending that could cut 3–5bps. The ledger has a single owner with no succession. Growth is 38% and NRR 121%, so the franchise is strong. But the downside cases cluster around concentration, regulation and key-person risk, so we should make the deal conditional on merchant diversification and a ledger-succession plan. Therefore, proceed with two conditions precedent.

rubric_notes: Line 1: proceed, conditional on merchant diversification + ledger succession.
Nest the three risks as supporting bullets.
